name: CLX - MGA Insurance Policy Recommendation Engine v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). After needs analysis completes, ranks top 3-5 carrier products by match quality. Phase 5 MVP uses a STATIC product matrix coded inline (top Canadian carriers per product type). Phase 6 will swap to live carrier-API integration. Inserts policy_recommendations rows (vertical_id='insurance') ordered by ai_ranking, then triggers compliance review (A1.1 review_type=suitability).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, review_type: 'suitability', suitability_id: $('Fan Out Recs').first().json.suitability_assessment_id, client_id: $('Fan Out Recs').first().json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Fan Out Recs').first().json.advisor_id }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', recommendations_count: $('Fan Out Recs').all().length, suitability_assessment_id: $('Fan Out Recs').first().json.suitability_assessment_id }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: $json.error || 'no recommendations produced' }) }}
